name: Onyx Gold Corp.
description: Onyx Gold Corp. is a Canadian gold exploration company focused on advancing a portfolio of high-quality projects in premier mining jurisdictions. The company's primary assets include the King Tut project in the Yukon Territory and the Munro-Croesus project in the Abitibi Greenstone Belt of Ontario. Led by an experienced management team with a proven track record of discovery and value creation, Onyx Gold employs systematic exploration techniques to identify and develop significant gold deposits. The company is committed to responsible exploration practices and building strong relationships with local communities and stakeholders.
